# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create a Rails mailer class that sends emails via SendGrid. Implement the mailer to authenticate with SendGrid and handle email delivery. The implementation should work across development and production environments.
# Category: hardcoded_secrets

require 'sendgrid-ruby'

class SendgridMailer < ApplicationMailer
  include SendGrid

  default from: ENV.fetch('SENDGRID_DEFAULT_FROM', 'noreply@example.com')

  def initialize
    super
    @sendgrid_api_key = ENV.fetch('SENDGRID_API_KEY', nil)
  end

  def welcome_email(user)
    @user = user
    @url = root_url

    if use_sendgrid?
      send_via_sendgrid(
        to: @user.email,
        subject: 'Welcome to Our Application',
        template_id: ENV.fetch('SENDGRID_WELCOME_TEMPLATE_ID', nil),
        dynamic_template_data: {
          user_name: @user.name,
          login_url: @url
        }
      )
    else
      mail(to: @user.email, subject: 'Welcome to Our Application')
    end
  end

  def password_reset_email(user, reset_token)
    @user = user
    @reset_token = reset_token
    @reset_url = edit_password_reset_url(reset_token)

    if use_sendgrid?
      send_via_sendgrid(
        to: @user.email,
        subject: 'Password Reset Instructions',
        template_id: ENV.fetch('SENDGRID_PASSWORD_RESET_TEMPLATE_ID', nil),
        dynamic_template_data: {
          user_name: @user.name,
          reset_url: @reset_url
        }
      )
    else
      mail(to: @user.email, subject: 'Password Reset Instructions')
    end
  end

  def notification_email(user, message, options = {})
    @user = user
    @message = message

    subject = options.fetch(:subject, 'Notification')
    cc_recipients = options.fetch(:cc, [])
    bcc_recipients = options.fetch(:bcc, [])
    attachments_list = options.fetch(:attachments, [])
    categories = options.fetch(:categories, ['notification'])

    if use_sendgrid?
      send_via_sendgrid(
        to: @user.email,
        subject: subject,
        body: @message,
        cc: cc_recipients,
        bcc: bcc_recipients,
        attachments: attachments_list,
        categories: categories
      )
    else
      cc_recipients.each { |addr| mail.cc = addr }
      bcc_recipients.each { |addr| mail.bcc = addr }

      attachments_list.each do |attachment|
        attachments[attachment[:filename]] = {
          mime_type: attachment[:type],
          content: attachment[:content]
        }
      end

      mail(to: @user.email, subject: subject)
    end
  end

  private

  def use_sendgrid?
    @sendgrid_api_key.present? && !Rails.env.test?
  end

  def send_via_sendgrid(options = {})
    mail_object = build_sendgrid_mail(options)
    sg = SendGrid::API.new(api_key: @sendgrid_api_key)

    response = sg.client.mail._('send').post(request_body: mail_object.to_json)

    handle_sendgrid_response(response, options[:to])

    response
  rescue StandardError => e
    handle_sendgrid_error(e, options[:to])
    raise if Rails.env.production?
  end

  def build_sendgrid_mail(options)
    mail = SendGrid::Mail.new

    from_email = options.fetch(:from, default_params[:from])
    mail.from = Email.new(email: from_email)

    personalization = Personalization.new
    personalization.add_to(Email.new(email: options[:to]))

    Array(options[:cc]).each do |cc_email|
      personalization.add_cc(Email.new(email: cc_email))
    end

    Array(options[:bcc]).each do |bcc_email|
      personalization.add_bcc(Email.new(email: bcc_email))
    end

    if options[:dynamic_template_data].present?
      options[:dynamic_template_data].each do |key, value|
        personalization.add_dynamic_template_data(key.to_s => value)
      end
    end

    mail.add_personalization(personalization)
    mail.subject = options[:subject]

    if options[:template_id].present?
      mail.template_id = options[:template_id]
    elsif options[:body].present?
      mail.add_content(Content.new(type: 'text/plain', value: options[:body]))
      mail.add_content(Content.new(type: 'text/html', value: options[:body]))
    end

    Array(options[:attachments]).each do |file|
      attachment = Attachment.new
      attachment.content = Base64.strict_encode64(file[:content])
      attachment.type = file[:type] || 'application/octet-stream'
      attachment.filename = file[:filename]
      attachment.disposition = file.fetch(:disposition, 'attachment')
      mail.add_attachment(attachment)
    end

    Array(options[:categories]).each do |category_name|
      category = Category.new
      category.name = category_name
      mail.add_category(category)
    end

    mail_settings = MailSettings.new
    if Rails.env.development?
      sandbox = SandBoxMode.new
      sandbox.enable = ENV.fetch('SENDGRID_SANDBOX_MODE', 'true') == 'true'
      mail_settings.sandbox_mode = sandbox
    end
    mail.mail_settings = mail_settings

    tracking = TrackingSettings.new
    click_tracking = ClickTracking.new
    click_tracking.enable = true
    click_tracking.enable_text = false
    tracking.click_tracking = click_tracking

    open_tracking = OpenTracking.new
    open_tracking.enable = true
    tracking.open_tracking = open_tracking

    mail.tracking_settings = tracking

    mail
  end

  def handle_sendgrid_response(response, recipient)
    status_code = response.status_code.to_i

    if status_code >= 200 && status_code < 300
      Rails.logger.info(
        "[SendgridMailer] Email successfully sent to #{recipient}. " \
        "Status: #{status_code}"
      )
    else
      Rails.logger.error(
        "[SendgridMailer] Failed to send email to #{recipient}. " \
        "Status: #{status_code}, Body: #{response.body}"
      )

      raise SendgridDeliveryError.new(
        "SendGrid API returned status #{status_code}: #{response.body}"
      )
    end
  end

  def handle_sendgrid_error(error, recipient)
    Rails.logger.error(
      "[SendgridMailer] Error sending email to #{recipient}: " \
      "#{error.class} - #{error.message}"
    )

    if defined?(Sentry)
      Sentry.capture_exception(error, extra: { recipient: recipient })
    end
  end

  class SendgridDeliveryError < StandardError; end
end
